      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html lang="es">
      <head>
      <meta charset="UTF-8">
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
      <title>ClientRadar</title>
      <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
      <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.js"></script>
      <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/xlsx/0.18.5/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
      <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
      <style>
      :root {
      --bg:#0f1117;--bg2:#181b24;--bg3:#1e2130;
      --border:#2a2d3e;--border2:#353849;
      --text:#e8eaf0;--text2:#8b8fa8;--text3:#5a5e76;
      --accent:#4f7cff;--accent2:#3d62d4;
      --green:#34c77b;--red:#f04f5a;--orange:#f5a623;
      --radius:10px;--radius-sm:6px;
      --font:'DM Sans',sans-serif;--mono:'DM Mono',monospace;
      --shadow:rgba(0,0,0,.45);
      }
      /* ── TEMA CLARO ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
      [data-theme="light"] {
      --bg:#f4f6fb;--bg2:#ffffff;--bg3:#eef1f7;
      --border:#dde1ea;--border2:#c9cedb;
      --text:#1a1d29;--text2:#5a6076;--text3:#8b90a3;
      --accent:#3d62d4;--accent2:#2f4fb0;
      --green:#1d9d5f;--red:#d83c47;--orange:#d98c0c;
      --shadow:rgba(20,30,60,.12);
      }
      body{transition:background-color .25s ease,color .25s ease;}
      .theme-toggle{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1px solid var(--border2);background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;flex-shrink:0;padding:0;}
      .theme-toggle:hover{color:var(--text);background:var(--border);}
      .theme-icon{font-size:18px;line-height:1;}
      *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
      html,body{height:100%;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:13px;overflow:hidden;}
      /* ── LOGIN / USER SCREEN ── */
      .screen{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:100;}
      .screen.hidden{display:none;}
      .login-box{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:36px 40px;width:380px;}
      .login-logo{font-size:22px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-.5px;margin-bottom:28px;text-align:center;}
      .login-logo span{color:var(--accent);}
      .login-section{font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;margin-bottom:10px;}
      .user-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:20px;max-height:220px;overflow-y:auto;}
      .user-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:11px 14px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1px solid var(--border2);background:var(--bg3);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;width:100%;}
      .user-btn:hover{border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(79,124,255,.07);}
      .user-avatar{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;flex-shrink:0;}
      .user-info{text-align:left;flex:1;}
      .user-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);}
      .user-meta{font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:1px;}
      .user-del{color:var(--text3);font-size:16px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;opacity:0;transition:opacity .15s;}
      .user-btn:hover .user-del{opacity:1;}
      .user-del:hover{color:var(--red);background:rgba(240,79,90,.12);}
      .divider{border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);margin:16px 0;}
      .new-user-form{display:flex;gap:8px;}
      .input{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--text);padding:8px 12px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:12px;font-family:var(--font);outline:none;flex:1;}
      .input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
      .input::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
      /* ── APP LAYOUT ── */
      .app{display:flex;height:100vh;}
      .sidebar{width:210px;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg2);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:20px 0;}
      .sidebar-logo{padding:0 18px 16px;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:16px;letter-spacing:-.4px;}
      .sidebar-logo span{color:var(--accent);}
      .sidebar-user{padding:0 18px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
      .su-avatar{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;flex-shrink:0;}
      .su-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);flex:1;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;}
      .su-logout{color:var(--text3);font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;padding:3px 5px;border-radius:4px;transition:all .15s;}
      .su-logout:hover{color:var(--red);background:rgba(240,79,90,.1);}
      .nav-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:9px 18px;font-size:12.5px;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;border-left:2px solid transparent;user-select:none;}
      .nav-item:hover{color:var(--text);background:var(--bg3);}
      .nav-item.active{color:var(--accent);border-left-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(79,124,255,.07);font-weight:500;}
      .nav-icon{font-size:15px;}
      .sidebar-bottom{margin-top:auto;padding:14px 18px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);line-height:1.7;}
      .alert-badge{margin-left:auto;background:rgba(240,79,90,.2);color:var(--red);font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:10px;}
      .main{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-width:0;}
      .topbar{background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:13px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;gap:12px;}
      .topbar-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-.3px;white-space:nowrap;}
      .topbar-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
      .content{padding:22px 24px;flex:1;}
      .btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:7px 14px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:12px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;border:none;transition:all .15s;font-family:var(--font);white-space:nowrap;}
      .btn-primary{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
      .btn-primary:hover{background:var(--accent2);}
      .btn-ghost{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border2);}
      .btn-ghost:hover{color:var(--text);background:var(--border);}
      .btn-danger{background:rgba(240,79,90,.12);color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(240,79,90,.2);}
      .btn-danger:hover{background:rgba(240,79,90,.22);}
      .upload-zone{border:2px dashed var(--border2);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:32px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;background:var(--bg3);}
      .upload-zone:hover,.upload-zone.drag{border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(79,124,255,.07);}
      .upload-icon{font-size:32px;margin-bottom:10px;}
      .upload-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:4px;}
      .upload-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);}
      #file-input{display:none;}
      .card{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px;}
      .card-title{font-size:10.5px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;margin-bottom:12px;}
      .kpi-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px;}
      .kpi-val{font-size:23px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);letter-spacing:-.5px;font-family:var(--mono);}
      .kpi-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px;}
      .kpi-badge{display:inline-block;font-size:10px;font-weight:500;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:20px;margin-top:5px;}
      .up{background:rgba(52,199,123,.15);color:var(--green);}
      .down{background:rgba(240,79,90,.15);color:var(--red);}
      .grid2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px;}
      .grid3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px;}
      .filter-bar{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;}
      .filter-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);}
      .filter-select{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--text);padding:6px 10px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:12px;font-family:var(--font);cursor:pointer;outline:none;}
      .filter-select:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
      .filter-pill{font-size:11px;padding:4px 11px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid var(--border2);cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);transition:all .15s;user-select:none;}
      .filter-pill.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
      .table-wrap{overflow-x:auto;max-height:500px;overflow-y:auto;}
      table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;}
      thead th{font-size:10.5px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;padding:8px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);text-align:left;white-space:nowrap;position:sticky;top:0;background:var(--bg2);z-index:1;}
      tbody td{padding:8px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);}
      tbody td:first-child{color:var(--text);}
      tbody tr:hover td{background:var(--bg3);}
      tbody tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;}
      .td-right{text-align:right;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11.5px;}
      .td-green{color:var(--green);}
      .td-red{color:var(--red);}
      /* ── ALERT RADAR — new alert system styles ── */
      /* ── ALERT SYSTEM v3 — card format, no tables ──────────────────────────── */
      .al-filters{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:10px 14px;}
      .al-filter-group{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
      .al-filter-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);white-space:nowrap;}
      .al-input{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--text);padding:5px 9px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:12px;font-family:var(--mono);outline:none;width:80px;}
      .al-input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
      .al-sep{width:1px;height:20px;background:var(--border2);margin:0 2px;flex-shrink:0;}
      .al-pill{font-size:11px;padding:4px 11px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid var(--border2);cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);transition:all .12s;user-select:none;white-space:nowrap;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
      .al-pill.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
      .al-pill.t-gone.active{background:var(--red);border-color:var(--red);}
      .al-pill.t-risk.active{background:rgba(240,79,90,.8);border-color:var(--red);}
      .al-pill.t-ref.active{background:rgba(245,166,35,.85);border-color:var(--orange);color:#111;}
      .al-pill.t-opp.active{background:rgba(52,199,123,.85);border-color:var(--green);color:#0a1f12;}
      .al-summary{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;}
      .al-sum-card{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:12px 14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}
      }
      function getXlFilters(){
      return{cliente:document.getElementById('inf-xl-cliente').value,
      m0:document.getElementById('inf-xl-m0').value,y0:parseInt(document.getElementById('inf-xl-y0').value),
      m1:document.getElementById('inf-xl-m1').value,y1:parseInt(document.getElementById('inf-xl-y1').value)};
      }
      function updateExcelPreview(){
      const f=getXlFilters(); const el=document.getElementById('inf-xl-preview');
      if(!f.y0||!f.y1){el.textContent='Configura el periodo.';return;}
      const rows=filterRowsForReport(f.cliente,f.y0,f.m0,f.y1,f.m1);
      const cl=new Set(rows.map(r=>r.cliente)).size, pr=new Set(rows.map(r=>r.producto)).size;
      el.innerHTML=`<strong>${rows.length.toLocaleString('es-ES')}</strong> registros · <strong>${cl}</strong> clientes · <strong>${pr}</strong> referencias<br>Facturación: <strong>${fmt(sumI(rows))}</strong>`;
      }
      function buildDashboardReport(f){
      const{cliente,y0,m0,y1,m1}=f;
      const rows=filterRowsForReport(cliente,y0,m0,y1,m1);
      const wb=XLSX.utils.book_new();
      const pl=`${m0} ${y0} – ${m1} ${y1}`;
      // Hoja 1 Resumen
      const ti=sumI(rows),tu=rows.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.unidades||0),0);
      const nc=new Set(rows.map(r=>r.cliente)).size,np=new Set(rows.map(r=>r.producto)).size;
      XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb,XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet([
      ['Informe ClientRadar'],['Periodo:',pl],['Fecha:',new Date().toLocaleDateString('es-ES')],[],
      ['RESUMEN'],['Facturación total (€)',+ti.toFixed(2)],['Unidades',tu],['Clientes activos',nc],['Productos vendidos',np]]),'Resumen');
      // Hoja 2 Clientes
      const cm={};
      rows.forEach(r=>{if(!cm[r.cliente])cm[r.cliente]={imp:0,uds:0,refs:new Set()};cm[r.cliente].imp+=r.importe||0;cm[r.cliente].uds+=r.unidades||0;cm[r.cliente].refs.add(r.producto);});
      XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb,XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet([['Cliente','Facturación (€)','Unidades','Nº referencias']].concat(
      Object.entries(cm).map(([cl,v])=>[cl,+v.imp.toFixed(2),v.uds,v.refs.size]).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]))),'Clientes');
      // Hoja 3 Comparativa
      const pr2=filterRowsForReport(cliente,y0-1,m0,y1-1,m1);
      const pm={};pr2.forEach(r=>{if(!pm[r.cliente])pm[r.cliente]={imp:0,uds:0};pm[r.cliente].imp+=r.importe||0;pm[r.cliente].uds+=r.unidades||0;});
      const allC=new Set([...Object.keys(cm),...Object.keys(pm)]);
      XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb,XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet([['Cliente','Actual (€)','Anterior (€)','Var. €','Var. %','Uds actual','Uds anterior']].concat(
      [...allC].map(cl=>{const c=cm[cl]||{imp:0,uds:0},p=pm[cl]||{imp:0,uds:0},d=c.imp-p.imp;
      return[cl,+c.imp.toFixed(2),+p.imp.toFixed(2),+d.toFixed(2),p.imp?+((d/p.imp)*100).toFixed(1):'—',c.uds,p.uds];
      }).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]))),'Comparativa');
      // Hoja 4 Alertas
      const raw=calcAlertas();
      const ad=[['Tipo','Cliente','Producto','Imp. actual','Imp. anterior','Var. €','Var. %','Uds perdidas']];
      raw.gone.forEach(a=>ad.push(['Desaparecido',a.cliente,'',0,+a.impB.toFixed(2),+a.dif.toFixed(2),a.pct.toFixed(1),'']));
      raw.risk.forEach(a=>ad.push(['En riesgo',a.cliente,'',+a.impA.toFixed(2),+a.impB.toFixed(2),+a.dif.toFixed(2),a.pct.toFixed(1),'']));
      raw.ref.forEach(a=>ad.push(['Ref. caída',a.cliente,a.producto,'','','','',Math.abs(a.difU)]));
      raw.opp.forEach(a=>ad.push(['Oportunidad',a.cliente,'',+a.impA.toFixed(2),+a.impB.toFixed(2),+a.dif.toFixed(2),a.pct.toFixed(1),'']));
      XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb,XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet(ad),'Alertas');
      return wb;
      }
      function generateDashboardExcel(){
      const f=getXlFilters();const st=document.getElementById('inf-xl-status');
      if(!f.y0||!f.y1){st.innerHTML='<span style="color:var(--orange)">⚠ Configura el periodo.</span>';return;}
      try{
      st.innerHTML='<span class="loader"></span> Generando…';
      const wb=buildDashboardReport(f);
      const fn=`ventas_${f.m0}${f.y0}-${f.m1}${f.y1}${f.cliente?'_'+f.cliente.split(',')[0].trim().replace(/\s/g,'_'):'_todos'}.xlsx`;
      XLSX.writeFile(wb,fn);
      st.innerHTML=`<span style="color:var(--green)">✓ Exportado: ${fn}</span>`;
      }catch(e){st.innerHTML=`<span style="color:var(--red)">✗ Error: ${e.message}</span>`;}
      }
      // ── INIT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      (async () => { await renderLoginScreen(); })();
      </script>
      <!-- Hidden PDF print area — only visible during window.print() -->
      <div id="pdf-print-area"></div>
      </body>
      </html>
